summary: Iteration 30 - Cooperative Dashboard 4 Fixes Testing. ALL 10 BACKEND TESTS PASSED. ALL 7 UI FEATURES VERIFIED. Tested: 1) Cooperative login (bielaghana, gagnoa, agent terrain), 2) Agents Terrain stat card (1/1), 3) Membres Actifs stat card (1/1), 4) Accueil button navigates to /, 5) Profil button navigates to /profile, 6) Naturalisation menu in Actions Rapides navigates to /cooperative/parcels/verification, 7) Recent member 'Balde ibo' from 'zebia' displayed.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx correctly implements 'Agents Terrain' stat card using data-testid='stat-agents-terrain' with cyan color styling
Dashboard.jsx correctly implements 'Accueil' (Home) button with data-testid='home-btn' navigating to /
Dashboard.jsx correctly implements 'Profil' button with data-testid='profile-btn' navigating to /profile
Dashboard.jsx correctly implements 'Naturalisation' quick action with data-testid='quick-action-naturalisation' navigating to /cooperative/parcels/verification
Backend cooperative.py get_coop_dashboard() correctly returns 'agents' object with total/active/activated counts using proper ObjectId matching
Backend correctly uses $or query to match coop_id in both string and ObjectId formats for backward compatibility
seed_data_creation: None - used existing accounts from bielaghana cooperative with member 'Balde ibo' from 'zebia' and 1 agent terrain
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 tested the cooperative dashboard 4 fixes: 1) Agents Terrain stat card now shows agent count, 2) Accueil (Home) button added to header, 3) Profil button added to header, 4) Naturalisation menu added to Actions Rapides. All features working correctly. Login uses 'identifier' field not 'email' and returns 'access_token'. Dashboard API is GET /api/cooperative/dashboard with Bearer token auth.

features_verified.GET /api/cooperative/dashboard: PASS - Returns agents object with total/active/activated

mocked_api_note: Orange Money, Orange SMS, USSD Gateway are in mock mode (not relevant to this test iteration)
